title: Excalibur | Yori3o's Grappling Hooks support
description: This resource pack redraws the Yori3o's Grappling Hooks mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Yori3o's Grappling Hooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/yori3os-grappling-hooks) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- Yori3o - Creator of Yori3o's Grappling Hooks
